metadata.title: Femdom Chat — Consent-Forward Adult Discussion Community | FemdomChat.net
metadata.description: FemdomChat.net is an English, adults-only (18+) moderated chat for respectful discussion of female-led dynamics, boundaries, and relationships — with published rules, privacy transparency, and safety resources. Not a substitute for therapy or emergency services.

openGraph.title: FemdomChat.net — Moderated Adult Community Chat
openGraph.description: English-language chat emphasizing consent, negotiation, and member safety. Clear policies, reporting workflow, and structured guidance pages.

hero.title: Thoughtful conversation for adults who value consent first
hero.subtitle: FemdomChat.net hosts live English chat about female-led relationships and related topics only where everything is consensual, risk-aware, and respectful. We demonstrate EEAT through explicit policies: you will find moderation standards, privacy disclosures, and safety articles written for real-world decision-making — not sensational clickbait.

ageVerification.title: Age Verification 18+
ageVerification.text: This site discusses adult relationship themes. You must be at least 18 years old (or the age of majority where you live, whichever is higher) to continue.

report.success: Report sent. Thank you for keeping us safe.
report.title: Report User
report.description: Please select a reason for reporting this content. We review all reports to maintain safety.
report.label: Reason:

items.title: Negotiation before fantasy
items.content: "Other spaces jump straight into role-play spam. Here moderators remind people about consent language and limits. That professionalism keeps discussions grounded."
items.author: R. — joined 2024

items.title: Room for beginners and veterans
items.content: "I could ask basic vocabulary questions without mockery. Veterans pointed me to resources instead of gatekeeping."
items.author: Morgan — joined 2025

items.title: Harassment handled quickly
items.content: "Got an inappropriate DM — reported, account gone same day. Trust restored."
items.author: Chris — joined 2023

safety.title: Authority on safety starts with clear boundaries

items.title: Consent is non-negotiable
items.content: We remove content that promotes coercion, stealthing, non-consensual exposure, or exploitation. Moderators interpret context — slogans are not a substitute for informed consent.

items.title: Privacy & discretion
items.content: Read our Privacy Policy for retention and processor details. Do not post identifiable third parties or intimate media without verified consent — violations lead to bans and cooperation with law enforcement when mandated.

items.title: Member education
items.content: Our Safety Guide links mental-health caution: kink exploration should complement, not replace, professional care when needed.

footer.disclaimer: Adults only (18+). Educational and conversational — not medical or legal advice. Emergencies require real-world services.

cookieConsent.message: We use cookies to ensure the site functions correctly and to improve your experience.

about.title: About FemdomChat.net
about.description: Purpose, moderation philosophy, and trustworthiness for our adult chat.

content.heading: Purpose
content.text: FemdomChat.net connects adults interested in female-led relationship dynamics and adjacent topics where consent, negotiation, and mutual respect are prerequisites — never optional extras.

content.heading: Moderation expertise
content.text: Volunteer and staff moderators train on platform rules, escalation paths, and documentation updates. When edge cases arise, we prioritize victim safety and legal compliance over mere message volume.

content.heading: Transparency
content.text: Policies spell out prohibited behavior, data handling, and contact routes. Transparency supports EEAT: experienced operators publish how decisions are made at a policy level even when individual cases remain confidential.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Personal data practices for FemdomChat.net visitors and members.

content.heading: Categories of data
content.text: Account identifiers, optional email, OAuth tokens, chat payloads, moderation logs tied to incidents, and technical telemetry needed for uptime/security.

content.heading: Legal bases
content.text: Contract performance for signed-in users, legitimate interests for fraud prevention, consent where cookies exceed strict necessity — aligned with GDPR-style transparency.

content.heading: Retention
content.text: Messages persist until user deletion or overriding legal hold. Security logs rotate on a schedule documented internally and available upon authenticated account inquiry.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: Binding rules for participating in FemdomChat.net.

content.heading: Adults & conduct
content.text: Only adults may participate. Harassment, hate speech, revenge tactics, financial scams, and encouragement of illegal acts are forbidden.

content.heading: Content responsibilities
content.text: You warrant you have rights to media you upload/links you seed. We may remove allegedly infringing or abusive material pending investigation.

content.heading: Enforcement
content.text: Violations may trigger warnings, mutes, or permanent bans. Circumvention attempts compound sanctions.

safety.title: Safety Guide
safety.description: Risk awareness, negotiation habits, and crisis routing.

content.heading: Negotiate explicitly
content.text: Document limits, safewords or equivalents, aftercare needs, and check-ins — especially online-to-offline transitions.

content.heading: Recognize manipulation
content.text: Pressure to bypass limits, isolate from friends, or send compromising collateral are red flags. Step away and report.

content.heading: When to call professionals
content.text: Mental health crises, intimate partner violence, or imminent self-harm require licensed responders — use local hotlines and emergency numbers.

content.heading: Safety
content.text: safety@femdomchat.net — harassment, exploitation concerns, law-enforcement inquiries routed appropriately.

content.heading: Operator
content.text: FemdomChat.net service operator publication complies with applicable commercial disclosure statutes for its registered jurisdiction.

content.heading: External sites
content.text: Linked resources are independent; their accuracy is their authors’ responsibility.
